title: Quran, Sura 48: Al-Fath
description: Sura 48 (Al-Fath: The Victory) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 48 (Al-Fath: The Victory) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Indeed, We have given you a clear conquest, that God may forgive for you what preceded of your sin and what will follow.
